Request chat
Raise a request
Please select one of the following flows
MOCR - Strategy flow
MOCR - Strategy flow
The MOCR - Strategy flow is a workflow designed to manage strategy-related changes for Maintenance Plans and their associated Maintenance Items and Task Lists. In this flow, the main datasets involved are:
  1. Maintenance Plan: Represents the high-level maintenance plan structure.
  2. Maintenance Item: Contains specific maintenance tasks or activities under a plan.
  3. Task List: Details step-by-step procedures or task groups that can be referenced by Maintenance Items.
Relationships:
  1. A Maintenance Plan can have multiple Maintenance Items (child dataset).
  2. Each Maintenance Item can reference a Task List (reference dataset).
All changes and dependencies must be managed according to this hierarchy: Task List (reference) > Maintenance Plan (parent) > Maintenance Item (child). You can perform CREATE, CHANGE, or DELETE operations on these datasets according to business rules.
Create new Task List: Task List Description: Elec Repl LCS 1 Btn SS Enclosure SquareD, Planning Plant: CY02, Main Work Centre: MN55, Work Centre Plant: CY02, Responsible Planner Group: Z00, Maintenance Strategy: TWKN01, Assembly: 80260445, Operation Number: 0010, Work Centre: MN55-E01, Work Centre Plant: CY02, Operation Short Text: Setup for Service Drill, Normal Operation Duration: 2, Number of Capacities Required: 1; Add Maintenance Package: Operation: 0010, Package Number: 2; Add Components: Material Number: 11134161, Quantity: 3; Create new Maintenance Item, Maintenance Item Description: 48W Stat HV Earth Grid Testing, System Condition: 1, Main Work Center: MN13, Work Center Plant: CY02, Maintenance Planner Group: C51, Order Type: PM02, Strategy: TWKN01, Functional Location: 3132.01.04.26-SV035-STRC; Create new Maintenance Plan, Maintenance Plan Description: 48W Stat HV Earth Grid Testing, Strategy: TWKN01, Tolerance for Late Completion (%): 10, Shift Factor for Early Completion: 10, Tolerance for Early Completion (%): 10, Cycle modification factor: 1, Call Horizon: 100, Sort Field: CY02-050, Authorization Group: CY02.
I have analyzed your request and identified 3 tasks that need to be executed. The tasks are ordered based on dataset dependencies, with the Task List created first (as it is a reference dataset required by other objects), followed by the Maintenance Plan, and finally the Maintenance Item. Please review the execution list and confirm if you're happy with this approach before proceeding.
Task description Dataset Action
Create new Task List with Description: Elec Repl LCS 1 Btn SS Enclosure SquareD, Planning Plant: CY02, Main Work Centre: MN55, Work Centre Plant: CY02, Responsible Planner Group: Z00, Maintenance Strategy: TWKN01, Assembly: 80260445, Operation 0010 (Work Centre: MN55-E01, Plant: CY02, Short Text: Setup for Service Drill, Duration: 2, Capacities: 1), add Maintenance Package (Operation: 0010, Package Number: 2), and add Component (Material Number: 11134161, Quantity: 3). Task list Create
Create new Maintenance Plan with Description: 48W Stat HV Earth Grid Testing, Strategy: TWKN01, Tolerance for Late Completion: 10%, Shift Factor for Early Completion: 10, Tolerance for Early Completion: 10%, Cycle modification factor: 1, Call Horizon: 100, Sort Field: CY02-050, Authorization Group: CY02. Maintenance plan Create
Create new Maintenance Item with Description: 48W Stat HV Earth Grid Testing, System Condition: 1, Main Work Center: MN13, Work Center Plant: CY02, Maintenance Planner Group: C51, Order Type: PM02, Strategy: TWKN01, Functional Location: 3132.01.04.26-SV035-STRC. Maintenance item Create

Natural
The new Maintenance Item with description 'Monthly Lubrication - Motor Bearings' has been successfully updated and all required task processing steps are complete.
Thought
All phases have been followed: Task interpreted as UPDATE for 'Maintenance Item' (datasetId 552816), metadata updated to IN_PROGRESS, execution tool invoked and update completed, final metadata set to COMPLETED. No mdoNumber required for UPDATE, prereq_ok was true throughout. All business rules (ordering, determinism, no interaction, update via metadata tool) were followed.

ConnektHub/Schemas
Industry:All
Label:All
Publisher:All
Duplicate record and golden record identification
17 downloads
Get
Once potential duplicates have been identified what record should be kept as the new golden record and which ones should be removed? Use our Golden Record identification algorithm (or create your own). Consider criteria like: Is the material listed as critical? Is the material stocked at any locations? Is the material listed in an active Outline Agreement (OA)? Are there any Info Records created for the material?

MaterialSparesDuplicateSchemaGolden record
 (122)
Publisher: Prospecta Software
Manufacturer part number identification
5 downloads
Identify the manufacturer part number using AI Model. DIW can identify and search for manufacturer part numbers while creating any new material. Use the AI-ML model to identify and extract the manufacturer part number from PO Free text fields. This extracted value can then be inserted into other field(s) or the same field for further use. For example, Spare part "MPN-123ABC", the rule will identify "123ABC" as the part number and look for a match in MRO Spare part library.

Free text purchasingMaterialSparesAIML

12 Jun

Brendan Allerton
Requestor · Request initiator · 3:15 PM
Hi, I need help verifying the following data 🤔

16 Jun

Jamie Adley
Approver · Request approver · 5:05 PM
I hope these documents will help
RW
Rick Woods
Approver · Request approver · 5:00 AM
Commercial publishing platforms and content management systems ensure that you can show different text, different data using the same template. When it's about controlling hundreds of articles, product pages for web shops, or user profiles in social networks, all of them potentially with different sizes, formats, rules for differing elements things can break, designs agreed upon can have unintended consequences and look much different than expected.
DL
Daniel Li
Reviewer · Request reviewer · 4:00 AM
Depending on the state of affairs it may be fine to concentrate either on design or content, reversing gears when needed.
